— intro sneak peak —

Bakugo didn’t like placing himself under the nervous or awkward category, in fact he avoided being put under that category, and no one ever tended to put him under those words

when it came to anything slightly romantic or sappy, he became a nervous mess — a nervous wreck even. had he had his first kiss? no.. no cause he always laughed kissing off with “HA! ha.”
